channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Anthropic] Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
item.description: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem

item.title: [Interconnects] State of the blog, mid-2026
item.description: State of the blog, mid-2026

item.title: [Hacker News] Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff
item.description: Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff

item.title: [GitHub Trending] DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp — High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
item.description: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp is a code intelligence MCP server that indexes codebases into knowledge graphs with sub-millisecond query performance across 158 languages.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/obra — An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
item.description: Obra is an agentic skills framework for software development methodology.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] google-research/timesfm — TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
item.description: TimesFM is Google Research's pretrained foundation model for time-series forecasting.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] continuedev/continue — open-source coding agent
item.description: continuedev/continue is an open-source coding agent trending on GitHub.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] sponsors/mattpocock — Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
item.description: Matt Pocock shares engineering skills from his .claude directory on GitHub.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] yairm210/Unciv — Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V
item.description: Unciv is an open-source Android and Desktop remake of Civilization V.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop — The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Stack: Connecting Cutting-Edge AI Models and Agent Infra
item.description: ByteDance released UI-TARS-desktop, an open-source multimodal AI agent stack integrating AI models with agent infrastructure.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] calesthio/OpenMontage — World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
item.description: OpenMontage is an open-source agentic video production system featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and 500+ agent skills.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] alexzhang13/rlm — General plug-and-play inference library for Recursive Language Models (RLMs), supporting various sandboxes.
item.description: Inference library for Recursive Language Models with plug-and-play support for various sandboxes.

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: High-Res Neural Cellular Automata
item.description: Show HN: High-Res Neural Cellular Automata

item.title: [Hacker News] The founder's playbook: Building an AI-native startup
item.description: The founder's playbook: Building an AI-native startup

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] GLM-5.2: the top Frontend Coding model in the world, IndexShare for Speculative Decoding
item.description: [AINews] GLM-5.2: the top Frontend Coding model in the world, IndexShare for Speculative Decoding

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Correct When Paired, Wrong When Split: Decoupling and Editing Modality-Specific Neurons in MLLMs
item.description: DECODE method fixes MLLM knowledge editing by targeting modality-specific neurons separately, preventing knowledge reversions when inputs switch from multimodal to unimodal.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diagnosing and Repairing Shape-Prior Shortcuts in Long-Range Single-Shot Fringe Projection Profilometry
item.description: Neural networks for long-range fringe measurement rely on shape priors instead of fringe patterns; proposed PhiCalNet removes this shortcut by outputting wrapped phase.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Informative Missingness to Generate Irregular Clinical Time Series
item.description: Diffusion model generates realistic clinical time series by jointly modeling lab values and their missing patterns as informative signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Models Take Notes at Prefill: KV Cache Can Be Editable and Composable
item.description: Research shows KV cache in transformers can be edited and reused across contexts without recomputation, improving inference speed by up to 14.9x.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Critical Role of Model Selection in Causal Inference: A Comparative Analysis of Classification Models within the InferBERT Framework for Pharmacovigilance
item.description: BioBERT with domain-specific pre-training most effectively identifies causal adverse drug events in the InferBERT pharmacovigilance framework.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Probing, Fusion, and Trustworthiness: A Systematic Evaluation of Foundation Model Representations for Multimodal Cancer Analysis
item.description: Foundation models achieve competitive cancer classification through multimodal image-omics fusion with uncertainty-aware conformal prediction methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MODE: Modality-Decomposed Expert-Level Mixed-Precision Quantization for MoE Multimodal LLMs
item.description: MODE proposes modality-decomposed expert-level mixed-precision quantization for MoE multimodal LLMs, achieving 2.9% average performance loss at W3A16 quantization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Noise-Driven Escape from Metastable Phases explains Grokking in Deep Neural Networks
item.description: Research explains grokking in neural networks as noise-driven escape from metastable states trapped in L2 regularization landscapes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards Fast GNN Surrogates for CO2 Migration in Complex Geological Formations
item.description: Graph neural network surrogate model forecasts CO2 migration in geological formations for carbon storage applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Verified Detection and Prevention of Concurrency Anomalies in Multi-Agent Large Language Model Systems
item.description: Study formally verifies detection and prevention of four concurrency anomalies in multi-agent LLM systems with mechanically-checked consistency hierarchies.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Finsler Geometry, Graph Neural Networks, and You
item.description: Finslerian graph neural networks use Finsler Laplacian instead of graph Laplacian to handle nonisotropic operators and recover diffusion geometry.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Constrained Diffusion Models with Primal-Dual Inference
item.description: Constrained diffusion models jointly infer primal and dual variables during sampling to solve entropy-regularized optimization problems with average constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] PowerOPD: Stabilizing On-Policy Distillation with Bounded Power Transformation
item.description: PowerOPD improves on-policy distillation for LLMs by replacing unbounded log-ratio rewards with bounded power transformations, achieving 6% accuracy gains and 59% faster training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sum-of-Squares Degree Barriers for the Reweighted-Hinge Method in Robust Halfspace Learning: A Christoffel-Function Characterization
item.description: Research establishes Sum-of-Squares degree barriers for robust halfspace learning, using Christoffel functions to characterize corruption that bounded-degree certificates cannot detect.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rift: A Conflict Signature for Deception in Language Models
item.description: Deceptive language models exhibit 2.1-2.3x higher residual rank than truthful models, enabling detection of lies with near-perfect accuracy without labeled training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty Quantification of Engineering Structures by Polynomial Chaos Expansion and Multivariate Active Learning
item.description: Researchers develop adaptive sampling method for polynomial chaos expansion surrogates to efficiently quantify uncertainty across multiple engineering model outputs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rethinking Groups in Critic-Free RLVR
item.description: Critic-free RL method proposes negative token filtering instead of grouped rollouts for more efficient, flexible language model training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ProCUA-SFT Technical Report
item.description: ProCUA-SFT dataset of 3.1M samples improves desktop-control agent performance on OSWorld from 26.3% to 45.0%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Decision-Driven Geosteering Under Uncertainty: A Unified Framework for Sequential Decision Optimization
item.description: Framework integrates particle filtering with reinforcement learning to optimize sequential geosteering decisions under geological uncertainty.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Counterfactual Optimization of Baseball Pitch Sequences and Estimation of Its Impact on Season-Level Statistics
item.description: Transformer model analyzes MLB pitch sequences via counterfactual optimization, showing both final and setup pitch improvements can increase strikeouts by 1.0+ per game.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MM++: Unsupervised Scale-Invariant Multilayer OOD Detection via Top-K Gated Feature Fusion
item.description: MM++ is an unsupervised OOD detection framework using scale-invariant multilayer feature fusion without requiring auxiliary data or model modifications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Performance-Driven Environment Abstraction with Multi-Timescale Learning
item.description: Multi-timescale learning approach abstracts large state spaces to improve reinforcement learning sample efficiency and replanning performance through dynamic state aggregation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Discrete-Log Clock: How a Transformer Learns Modular Multiplication
item.description: Transformers reduce modular multiplication to addition in discrete-log space, implementing a sparse Discrete-Log Clock algorithm revealed through multiplicative character transform analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Discrete Autoregressive Transformer for Generative Mechanism Synthesis
item.description: Discrete autoregressive transformer generates planar mechanism designs matching prescribed trajectories using quantized coordinates and VAE conditioning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Amortized Probabilistic Retrieval of Atmospheric CO2 from OCO-2 Spectra Using Deep Learning with Laplace Approximations and Normalizing Flows
item.description: Deep learning framework with Laplace approximations and normalizing flows accelerates atmospheric CO2 estimation from OCO-2 satellite spectra with improved uncertainty quantification.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Memory-Efficient Meta-Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Safety-Critical Control in Adversarial Spacecraft Proximity Operations
item.description: Mamba state-space models trained with PPO outperform LSTM and GRU architectures for safe, fuel-efficient autonomous spacecraft proximity operations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generalization Guarantees for Multi-Input Neural Operator Learning in Sobolev Spaces
item.description: Researchers develop generalization error bounds for multi-input neural operators with Sobolev norm outputs applicable to PDEs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MorphStrata: Layer-Specific Perturbations for Generating Morphence Students in Time-Series Moving Target Defense
item.description: MorphStrata defends time-series forecasting models against adversarial attacks by injecting layer-specific noise to generate heterogeneous student models efficiently.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Toward Controllable Catalyst Inverse Design via Large-Scale Autoregressive Pretraining
item.description: Transformer-based generative model pretrained on 133 million catalyst structures enables conditional design of heterogeneous catalysts with target properties.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Credibility-Weighted Pricing of Autonomous Vehicle Liability Under Operational Design Domain Shift
item.description: Hierarchical Bayesian framework prices autonomous vehicle liability by pooling sparse crash data across cities and software versions, outperforming non-pooled approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] T-Mem: Memory That Anticipates, Not Archives
item.description: T-Mem enables conversational agents to retrieve memories through both surface similarity and latent semantic connections using anticipatory write-time rehearsals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Few-Shot Biomedical Relation Extraction with Large Language Models: A Viable Alternative to Supervised Learning?
item.description: LLMs enable few-shot biomedical relation extraction with macro-F1 scores exceeding supervised baselines, particularly for rare relations in low-resource settings.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Encode Errors: Representational Retrieval of In-Context Demonstrations for Multilingual Grammatical Error Correction
item.description: Researchers extract grammatical error representations from LLM hidden states to improve in-context demonstration retrieval for multilingual grammatical error correction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Let LLMs Judge Each Other: Multi-Agent Peer-Reviewed Reasoning for Medical Question Answering
item.description: Multiple LLMs peer-reviewing each other's reasoning chains achieve higher medical question answering accuracy than single models or majority voting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Pepti-Agent: An AI Agent for Peptide Design and Optimization
item.description: Pepti-Agent is an AI framework that uses LLM-controlled MCP tools to iteratively design and optimize therapeutic peptides with multiple competing constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Transfer Learning for FHIR Questionnaire Terminology Binding
item.description: Six retrieval methods for linking FHIR Questionnaire items to LOINC codes show no universal winner; frozen BioLORD excels at top-rank accuracy, contrastive fine-tuning at recall.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ESBMC-PLC: Formal Verification of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking
item.description: ESBMC-PLC is the first open-source formal verifier for IEC 61131-3 ladder diagram programs, using SMT-based model checking.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Evaluative Judgement in Teaching AI-based Translation: A Class-room Case Study of AI-Mediated Translation and Post-Editing
item.description: Students in a translation course prioritized qualitative factors like fluency and effort over automatic metric rankings when selecting machine translation systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AthDGC: An Open Diachronic Greek Treebank with Indo-European Parallels
item.description: AthDGC provides the first openly licensed Greek treebank spanning eight diachronic periods with cross-alignment to Indo-European languages.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SHARD: Safe and Helpful Alignment via Self-Reframing Distillation
item.description: SHARD improves LLM responses to sensitive prompts by rewriting questions and reframing answers through self-distillation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Emergent retokenization symmetry in large language models: phenomenology and applications
item.description: Language models develop emergent symmetry enabling them to handle alternative tokenizations of identical inputs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EIBench: A Simulator-Based Benchmark and Turn-Credit RL for Emotion Management
item.description: EIBench simulator-based benchmark with 2,222 scenarios evaluates LLMs on interactive emotion management across support, defense, repair, and charm using turn-credit reinforcement learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LLM-Assisted Stance Detection in Scientific Discourse: A Test Case in Bayesian Cognitive Science
item.description: Three LLMs achieved 0.78 inter-rater reliability detecting realist versus instrumentalist philosophical stances in Bayesian cognitive science literature across 6,858 quotes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LLM Judges Have Dark Current: A Psychometric Datasheet for LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation
item.description: Researchers propose a measurement protocol for LLM judges revealing biases including dark current and positional false preference across models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Distilling Examples into Task Instructions: Enhanced In-Context Learning for Real-World B2B Conversations
item.description: Novel knowledge extraction methods distill B2B conversation examples into compact task instructions, reducing token usage 99% while improving classification performance.
